caller-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 17 migration and Spring Boot 3 requirements.
caller-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as the minimum baseline; using Spring Boot 2.x with Java 17 may lead to compatibility issues or missing features, and the migration recipe explicitly targets Spring Boot 3.

caller-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 17.
caller-service/pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile against Java 17 language features and bytecode version; keeping Java 11 settings would prevent compilation of Java 17-specific code or cause runtime incompatibilities with Spring Boot 3.
Spring Boot and other build plugins rely on this property to determine the Java version for compilation and runtime checks; mismatched versions can cause build failures.

person-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with Java 17 and Spring Boot 3 requirements.
person-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as the minimum baseline; using Spring Boot 2.x with Java 17 may lead to compatibility issues or missing features, and the migration recipe explicitly targets Spring Boot 3.

person-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 17.
person-service/pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile against Java 17 language features and bytecode version; keeping it at 11 would prevent usage of Java 17 APIs or cause mismatch with the Spring Boot 3 runtime.
Spring Boot and other plugins often rely on the java.version property to configure compilation and runtime behavior; it must match the target JDK.

person-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok dependency to a version compatible with Java 17 and Spring Boot 3.
person-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may not support Java 17 bytecode or annotation processing correctly, leading to compilation errors or runtime issues.

person-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/s.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence package.
person-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/s.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 17 to align with the target JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 15, which may fail to run on a Java 17 runtime due to internal API changes or missing features required by the upgraded dependencies (e.g., Spring Boot 3).
